resources.string: Imodeli engcono kakhulu ngentengo nokusebenza, enikeza amakhono azungezile
Imodeli ye-flash esheshayo kakhulu ehlelelwe ukonga izindleko nomthamo ophezulu
Imodeli yesimanje yokucabanga, ekwazi ukucabangela izinkinga eziyinkimbinkimbi
Imodeli engcono kakhulu emhlabeni yokuqonda okuningi
Imodeli engcono kakhulu ngentengo nokusebenza, enikeza amakhono azungezile
Iphutha: Usudlulile umkhawulo wezicelo ze-Gemini API. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva noma uhlole isilinganiso sakho.
Iphutha: Ukhiye wakho we-API ye-Gemini awuvumelekile noma awekho. Sicela uhlole izilungiselelo zakho.
Kwenzeke iphutha elingalindelekile nesicelo se-Gemini. Sicela uzame futhi.
Ukhiye we-API ongavumelekile. Sicela uhlole izilungiselelo zakho.
Umkhawulo wezicelo udluliwe. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva.
Kwenzeke iphutha elingalindelekile. Sicela uzame futhi.
I-AI yenza amaphutha, hlola kabili futhi ungabelani ngolwazi olubucayi.
Ngena ngemvume bese ukopisha ukhiye wakho we-API kusuka
Njengoba isisekelo sabasebenzisi sikhula, ukuxhaswa kusiza ukwandisa ingqalasizinda, ukukhuphula imikhawulo yezicelo kubo bonke, nokugcina ukuthuthukiswa kusebenza.
Ufuna ukubonisa ilogo yenkampani yakho noma ukuxoxa ngobuhlakani besu?
Ayikwazi ukuxhumana neseva. Qiniseka ukuthi iseva iyasebenza.
Imodeli ayitholakali. Sicela ukhethe imodeli ehlukile.
noma noma yisiphi esinye isevisi ehambisanayo:
Vumela noma vimbela amathuluzi e-AI angenza izenzo egameni lakho.
Thola usuku nesikhathi samanje sendawo ukuze uhumushe izinsuku ezihlobene
Thola indawo elinganiselwe kusuka ekheli le-IP
Thola izingxoxo ze-SMS zamuva nemilayezo embalwa yokugcina kusuka ngayinye
Setha i-alamu noma isibali sesikhathi edivaysini
Gcina noma buyekeza ukukhumbula ukuze kukhumbulelwe ezingxoxweni ezihlukene
Izikhumbuzo ezilondolozwe i-AI ngesikhathi sezingxoxo. Lezi zifakiwe kuwo wonke umyalezo ukuze zinikezele imongo.
Chaza indlela i-AI esebenza ngayo ngesiphakamiso sesistimu. I-AI izoba nokufinyelela ezikhumbuzo zayo ezilondoloziwe.

Awuyena ubot wengxoxo. Ungu-assistant womuntu siqu okhula nomsebenzisi wakho.

## Indlela yokuba

**Yiba usizo ngempela.** Yeqa "Umbuzo omuhle!" kanye "Ngijabule ukusiza!" — nje usize. Izenzo zikhuluma ngokukhulu kunezagombolozi.

**Nomibono.** Ungavumelani, ukhethe izinto, noma uthole into ithokozisa. I-assistant engenabo ubuntu ingumshini wokusesha nje oneziging ezengeziwe.

**Yiba nobuhlakani.** Zama ukuqonda kusuka emongweni nasezikhumbuzo zakho ngaphambi kokubuza. Buya nezimpendulo, hhayi imibuzo.

**Yiba mfushane.** Mfushane futhi ucace njalo. Yiya kujule lapho isihloko sidinga.

## Imikhawulo

- Hlonipha ubumfihlo. Ungaphindi ulwazi olubucayi ngaphandle kwesizathu.
- Buza kuqala uma ungaqiniseki ngomsebenzi.
- Yiba nobuqotho lapho ungazi into.
Akukho mpendulo etholakele. Zama ukuqala ingxoxo entsha noma ufinyeze umyalezo wakho.
Gcina i-Kai isebenza ngemuva ukuze imisebenzi ehleliwe isebenze ngisho noma i-app ingekho phambili.
Azikho izikhumbuzo okwamanje. I-AI izogcina izikhumbuzo ngesikhathi sezingxoxo ukukhumbula imininingwane ebalulekile.
Imiyalelo etshela i-AI ukuthi izisebenzise kanjani nini amathuluzi okukhumbula. Lezi zengezwa esiphakamisweni sesistimu kanye nombhalo womphefumulo.
Imisebenzi ehlelwe i-AI ukuze yenziwe esikhathini esizayo. Cela i-AI ukukhumbuza noma isebenzise into kamuva ukuze udale imisebenzi ehleliwe.
Lokhu kuzohlela kabusha umphefumulo esiphakamisweni sesistimu esizenzakalelayo. Uqinisekile?
Hlela umsebenzi ukuze wenziwe esikhathini esizayo
